CREATE TABLE test_strings (haystack String, needle String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('abcde', 'cde'), ('hello world', 'world'), ('abcdefg', 'xyz'), ('sâmple', 'mpl'), ('UTF-8 èncoding', 'çod');
SELECT ngramDistanceUTF8(haystack, needle) FROM test_strings WHERE haystack LIKE '%a%' AND needle LIKE '%c%';
SELECT ngramDistanceUTF8(haystack, needle) AS similarity FROM test_strings WHERE similarity > 0.5;

SELECT (SELECT ngramDistanceUTF8(haystack, needle) FROM test_strings WHERE haystack = 'abcde') as distance, (SELECT ngramDistanceUTF8(haystack, 'cde') FROM test_strings WHERE needle = 'cde') as distance_cde;
SELECT haystack, needle, ngramDistanceUTF8(haystack, needle) AS similarity FROM test_strings WHERE similarity BETWEEN 0.2 AND 0.8 ORDER BY similarity DESC;
CREATE TABLE results AS SELECT haystack, needle, ngramDistanceUTF8(haystack, needle) AS similarity FROM test_strings;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM results WHERE similarity >= 0.75;
SELECT ngramDistanceUTF8(haystack, needle) FROM (SELECT * FROM test_strings WHERE haystack != needle) as subquery WHERE haystack LIKE '%s%';
WITH (SELECT ngramDistanceUTF8('abcde', 'cde') AS sim) AS inner_query SELECT sim FROM inner_query WHERE sim > 0.6;
